presets.description: Create, edit, and export draw.io diagrams via CLI with real-time browser preview. Use when user needs to create or modify diagrams, generate mxGraphModel XML, or export diagrams as PNG/SVG.
Manage JIRA issues, sprints, boards, and Confluence pages via CLI. Use when user needs to create/search/update JIRA tickets, manage sprints, or edit Confluence pages.
